channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Australian Open: Iga Swiatek overwhelms Emma Navarro and will face Madison Keys in the semifinals
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Iga Swiatek is dominating her Australian Open opponents the way no one has at Melbourne Park since Maria Sharapova in 2013. Swiatek's latest lopsided win came via a 6-1, 6-2 score in the quarterfinals against No. 8 seed Emma Navarro on Wednesday. The No.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Patriots safety Jabrill Peppers goes on trial over allegations of domestic violence
item.description: QUINCY, Mass. (AP) — Patriots safety Jabrill Peppers is scheduled to go on trial Wednesday for allegedly shoving his girlfriend's head into a wall and repeatedly choking her after she received a phone call while they were in bed together.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL CASEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Coveted rookie card of Pirates star Paul Skenes pulled by young collector after offer from MLB team
item.description: Pirates ace Paul Skenes, one of the top prospects entering last season, wore an MLB debut patch on his uniform during his first big league game in May 2024.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jazz trade draft picks to Phoenix Suns
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz have so many first round draft picks over the next few years, they traded three of them to get one future first-rounder.
item.dc:creator: ABC 4

item.title: Phoenix Suns acquire three first-round picks from Utah Jazz in exchange for 2031 first-round pick
item.description: The Phoenix Suns have acquired three future first-round picks from the Utah Jazz in exchange for another first-round pick.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Detroit Lions sign former Michigan Wolverines wide receiver to reserve/future contract
item.description: The Detroit Lions have signed a former Michigan Wolverines standout wide receiver to a reserve/future contract.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: Vikings and coach Kevin O'Connell agree to a multiyear contract extension after a 14-win season
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — The Minnesota Vikings and coach Kevin O'Connell agreed to terms on a multiyear contract extension on Tuesday, following a 14-3 regular season that defied external widespread preseason projections of at least a losing record if not a last-place finish in the NFC North.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Liverpool beats Lille to reach Champions League round of 16. Barcelona wins 9-goal thriller
item.description: Liverpool became the first team to guarantee a place in the last 16 of the new Champions League format by beating Lille 2-1 on Tuesday, while Barcelona fought back from two goals down to stun Benfica 5-4 in a thriller.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ELLINGWORTH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Young collector nabs rare Paul Skenes card that could offer him a hefty haul in trade with Pirates
item.description: An 11-year-old collector in Los Angeles has scooped up a one-of-a-kind baseball card featuring National League Rookie of the Year Paul Skenes. Topps announced Tuesday that the card, which features the Pittsburgh Pirates pitcher’s autograph and a patch from a game-worn jersey, had been found.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Robert Kraft's son plans to run for mayor of Boston: report
item.description: Josh Kraft, the son of New England Patriots owner Robert, is reportedly set to announce that he will run for mayor of Boston next month.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: SafeSport Center adds morals clause, strengthens vetting after ex-investigator's arrests
item.description: The U.S. Center for SafeSport will add a morals clause to its code of conduct, and the CEO will start interviewing job candidates herself in the wake of the arrest of a former investigator who was charged with rape and other sex crimes.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Actor Michael Rapaport suggests Knicks sign Barron Trump to a contract
item.description: Barron Trump attended his father's inauguration and stood at an estimated 6-foot-8, which appeared to prompt the comedian to urge his favorite NBA team to consider the 18-year-old.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: High school boys basketball rankings Jan. 21, 2025: Bay Area News Group Top 20
item.description: Bay Area boys high school basketball rankings: California cracks Top 10. Dougherty Valley, Valley Christian, Menlo-Atherton, Acalanes rise. Palo Alto, Clayton Valley enter rankings.
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, The Mercury News

item.title: College Football Playoff lessons: Format tweaks needed, but expansion worked as designed
item.description: The 12-team format needs tweaks but succeeding in its primary mission of creating more access on multiple levels.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Ohio State celebrates and gets ready for all the changes coming to college football in 2025
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The early betting favorite to win next year's national championship: Ohio State. The question nobody can really answer at this time: What sort of sport will the Buckeyes or anyone else return to when they kick it off again seven months from now.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: In his hometown, Spurs' Victor Wembanyama dedicates a pair of new outdoor courts for kids to enjoy
item.description: LE CHESNAY, France (AP) — Victor Wembanyama stood on the center stripe of a new outdoor court in his hometown, his arms outstretched to their full 8-foot wingspan as he posed for a slew of photographers. He could not have seemed happier.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Novak Djokovic bests Carlos Alcaraz in Australian Open matchup as he pursues historic 25th Grand Slam title
item.description: Novak Djokovic is chasing history after defeating Carlos Alcaraz in a grueling 3 1/2-hour match in the quarterfinals of the Australian Open on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Brittney Griner to test the market for the first time in career as WNBA free agency opens
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Brittney Griner is testing the free agent market for the first time in her career. The All-Star center is taking meetings starting Tuesday with multiple teams, according to her agent. WNBA executives were in Miami for the opening of Unrivaled to talk with Griner and other free agents.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bay FC defender, 18-year pro player Jen Beattie announces retirement from soccer ahead of 2025 season
item.description: Jen Beattie's soccer career has come to an end, as the Bay FC defender and 18-year global soccer veteran announced she will be hanging up her cleats for good
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Ohio State QB Will Howard played his best in run to national title, and set a record along the way
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Will Howard transferred to Ohio State to win a national championship, and he reached that goal by playing the best football of his career throughout the Buckeyes' four games in the College Football Playoff.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
